summary: Iteration 63 - iPad Navigation Fix Verified. Changed LandingPage nav breakpoint from md: (768px) to lg: (1024px). Now iPad (768-1023px) correctly shows hamburger menu with ALL navigation links instead of truncated desktop nav. Desktop (1024px+) shows full nav bar with More dropdown containing 8 extra pages.
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx Line 48: Desktop nav changed from 'hidden md:flex' to 'hidden lg:flex' - CORRECT
LandingPage.jsx Line 98: Hamburger changed from 'md:hidden' to 'lg:hidden' - CORRECT
LandingPage.jsx Lines 105-135: Mobile menu contains all 17+ navigation links including Forms, Legal Framework, Glossary, Lawyers, Contact, How To Use, Caselaw Search
LandingPage.jsx Lines 67-81: Desktop More dropdown contains 8 pages: Forms, Glossary, Legal Framework, Lawyers, How To Use, Contact, Caselaw Search, Professional Summary
Dashboard.jsx Line 195: Sidebar uses lg:translate-x-0 - consistent with new breakpoint
Dashboard.jsx Line 285: Toggle button uses lg:hidden - consistent with new breakpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: iPad navigation fix verified. Breakpoint changed from md: (768px) to lg: (1024px). At 768-1023px, users see hamburger menu with all links. At 1024px+, users see desktop nav with More dropdown.

ipad_810px.mobile_menu_links: All 17+ links visible including Forms, Legal Framework, Glossary, Lawyers, Contact, How To Use, Caselaw Search
